headline: Interactive Brokers, Charles Schwab Slide Despite Earnings Surge
summary: Interactive Brokers earnings and Charles Schwab earnings both beat estimates for the second quarter on Tuesday, as volatile markets drove higher trading volume. Both SCHW stock and IBKR stock fell near buy points on Wednesday.

headline: Interactive Brokers beats Q2 forecasts on trading growth and higher interest income (NASDAQ:IBKR)
summary: Strong customer activity lifts earnings and revenueInteractive Brokers (NASDAQ:IBKR) reported second-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street expectations on Tuesday, as increased trading activity, expanding margin lending and stronger net interest income boosted earnings. The online brokerage posted earnings per share of $0.
